title: phlox drummondii subsp. drummondii
intro: Phlox drummondii subsp. drummondii, also known as Drummond's phlox or fragrant phlox, is a perennial plant species native to North America, belonging to the phlox genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as a diuretic. The health benefits of Phlox drummondii subsp. drummondii include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Phlox drummondii subsp. drummondii include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it medicinally.
